content.en:
Now it is a two-headed stone python, and if there are two more stone pythons, it will be a four-headed stone python.

The Lord of Mystery immediately made a decision and asked many other shore-level geniuses to escort her out of here.

As for Ye Tian and them, she thought they could still escape on their own.

Her plan was very good, and Ye Tian thought the same.

However, the unexpected still appeared.

From the passage in other directions, a giant python appeared again.

Rumble!!!

A giant python appeared and blocked all directions.

"Seven-headed ruin stone python, this is really troublesome!"

The face of the Lord of Mystic changed drastically.

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard, the Lord of the Golden Moon, and the Lord of the Sea Vortex also felt troubled, so many ruin stone pythons attacked, they couldn't protect the Lord of the Mystic at all!

The point is, none of them will necessarily be able to escape.

......

The speed of the Stone Python was so fast, and one of the Stone Pythons went directly towards the Lord of Mystery.

Wow!

The gray-white light hit the Lord of Mystery, and their magic circle blocked the light, so these other shore-level geniuses were not petrified.

Subsequently.

These other shore-level geniuses joined forces to besiege this ruin stone python, and they were able to barely compete with one or two for a while.

But immediately after, the second ruin stone python also came to kill this side.

The pressure on the two-headed stone python is too great.

Click!

The magic circle that many other level geniuses had jointly arranged began to crack a crack, which was a bad sign.

Of course.

They were also trying their best to hurt these two ruin stone pythons, but it was really difficult to kill these two ruin stone pythons.

As time passed, their formation gradually collapsed.

Rumble!!!!

The two ruin stone pythons joined forces to attack together, and finally broke the formation.

One by one, the other side-level geniuses flew out upside down.

Then.

The two ruin stone pythons released gray-white light at the same time, wanting to petrify these other shore-level geniuses.

One of the gray rays of light shot at the Lord of Mystery, if he was hit, the Lord of Mystic would have to be petrified for most of his body, it would be dangerous!

Rumble!!!

The golden body on the other side of the mystical lord's body exploded, and it had already completed the transformation of the golden body on the other side, plus the secret treasures on his body resisted, and the body was only petrified by one percent.

However.

Another other-level genius was not so lucky, and was directly petrified to seventy percent of his body.

Then.

The two ruined stone pythons continued to kill, covered in gray light, and struck at the Lord of Mystery.

Where do other other shore-level geniuses dare to stop them at this time, otherwise they will be looking for death!

Now.

The Lord of the Mystic was also very worried, and he didn't know what to do.

But suddenly.

A golden arm emerged from the void, and one hand grabbed the stone python.

Click!

The Stone Python was directly pinched and screamed in pain.

Bang!

The Stone Python was directly pinched and exploded, but it did not die immediately, and its body quickly recovered.

However.

The next moment.

The golden arm struck again.

Rumble!

A punch blasted the Stone Python.

The Stone Python exploded before it died, and the gray-white light covered Ye Tian.

But this time, Ye Tian resisted the gray light with his endless golden arm.

"Not petrified!"

He could actually dodge, but he just wanted to test whether his Endless Golden Arm could block the petrification ability.

Now it seems that it can be resisted!

In this way, he doesn't have to be afraid of the stone python's self-detonation petrification ability!

The Stone Python died, and many other geniuses were shocked.

At this time, all the other side level geniuses could see that this was Ye Tian's shot.

"The supreme technique of the other side!"

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard, the Lord of the Golden Moon, and the Lord of the Sea Vortex were all shocked.

They naturally knew the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore, and they had also participated in many weakened versions of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore, and they also had some understanding of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore.

They also wanted to create their own supreme art of the other side, but they never did.

If you want to create the supreme art of the other side, how can it be so simple!

Like them, the other side level geniuses, when they become the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Realm, the Origin Rule Realm of the other side is higher, and after a long time of enlightenment and creation, they may have the hope of creating their own Origin Realm Supreme Technique.

Once the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore is created, the strength will skyrocket.

For example, now, Ye Tian has performed the supreme technique on the other side, directly crushing the ruin stone python.

......

Ye Tian didn't want to expose his strength, but the Lord of the Mystics was in danger, if the Lord of the Mystics fell here, he didn't want to get benefits.

If he was here to collect resources by himself, the Xiao family would not let him go.

Therefore, he must save the Lord of the Mysteries.

Swish!

Ye Tian came to the other ruin stone python, and used the supreme technique of the other side, the Endless Golden Arm, holding the spear, the weapon of the origin rules, and pierced the opponent's body with one shot.

Soon.

The Stone Python was also killed by him.

And the self-explosion of this ruin stone python could not petrify Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

He began to assist the Lord of the Dragonlizards and them, slaying one stone python after another.

Soon, the seven-headed ruin stone python all died at Ye Tian's hands.

"Thank you, Lord of the Infinite!"

The Lord of the Mystic came over and thanked him.

"That's as it should be!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

And at this time, the Lord of the Dragon Lizard was also extremely respectful to Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian's strength far surpassed them.

"I'm going to triple the Endless Lord's reward!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

The other other shore-level geniuses naturally don't have any meaning, if Ye Tian's treatment is the same as that of the Dragon Lizard Lord, it will be unfair!

The stronger the strength, the better the treatment, this is an inevitable truth!

"Everyone, dig up the Xuyang Stone, there are a lot of Xuyang Stone here, take it as soon as possible, and then leave here. "

Ye Tian said.

"That's right, hurry up and dig up the Ruyang Stone!"

The Lord of Mystic urged.

This kind of small thing doesn't need Ye Tian to do, and the other other shore-level geniuses are responsible for excavating the Ruin Yang Stone.

After some time, all the ruin stones here were excavated.

"Lord of Mystery, a total of 3,800 ruin stones!"

A peer-level genius said.

"Very good!"

There are so many ruin stones in this area, it is simply unexpected.

Before, the ruin stones they found were only a few dozen or less than a hundred pieces at most.

And here are a few thousand dollars, multiplied many times, which is simply a big catch.

These ruin stones were naturally preserved by the Lord of Mystery, and then many other level geniuses continued to move forward.

In the next time, they were relatively safe, and they really encountered more than two Xuyang Stone Giant Pythons, and Ye Tian could just shoot directly.
